narrative:
Duchouquet Township has 9,641 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.3 percentage points.
